violations.text: Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Box of bread observed stored on the floor near the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The doors to the downstairs restrooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The ceiling in the downstairs storage area is not covered with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
Splashguard is needed between the handsink and the 3-bay sink at the coffee bar. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
